title: stelis riozunagensis
intro: Stelis riozunagensis, a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis riozunagensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Stelis riozunagensis are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in water or using it as a tea, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
